name: python3-lief
title: python3-lief
description:
Library to Instrument Executable Formats (Python 3)
LIEF is a library for parsing, modifying ELF, PE, and MachO formats.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-lief because Library to Instrument Executable Formats (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-lief as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-lief with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-lief --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
